name: Request → Approval Gate → Audit Log → Email
description: Receives a request, pauses for human approval, writes the decision to an audit database table, and sends an email notification. Useful for change management and compliance workflows.

config.REASON: Please review and approve this change request before it is applied

required_secrets.description: PostgreSQL connection URL for the audit log database
Gmail OAuth2 refresh token for sending notifications

replacements.config_delta: Replace TO+SUBJECT+BODY with CHANNEL (e.g. '#approvals'). Required secret: slack/bot_token added; google/gmail_oauth_token no longer needed.

Replace SOURCE_URL+TARGET_TABLE with a custom QUERY (e.g. INSERT INTO change_audit_log (request_id, decision, decided_at, actor) VALUES (...) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). Use for custom audit schema with specific column types or constraints.
